productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Printed Pink Handbag
description: A perfect ensemble for your ethnic and ethno-western outfits, this tote from lino perros comes with traditional Indian print and metallic embellishments. The copiously spaced compartments and wide handles give this bag a perfect blend of practicality and style. Height: 31 cmWidth: 39 cmDepth: 14 cm Made of synthetic leather with a fabric inner lining Ethnic print in distressed shading with metallic embellishments on the front Short and padded handles One main compartment with two open organiser pouches, one zippered compartment at the back and one zippered compartment dividing the main compartment in two One zippered pouch on the outside at the back Two buckled leather strips on the sides for style Branded zippers and sliders for durability Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
